h1: The true salon classics and more.
hero_subtitle: We are a hybrid salon. Please refer to stylist's name under each service for accurate pricing.

sections.heading: Luxury Color & Highlights
sections.body:
Mini Highlight - 1.5 hours - $90+
Includes 5-6 foils max. For lighter pieces around your face.

Touch-Up/All Over Color - 2 hours - $120-$195
Coloring regrowth from previous color or gray hair. Does not include lightening services.

Transformation/Color Correction - 4 hours - $260-$640
For unsatisfied color results from at-home applications or dramatic changes needed.

Partial Blonding - 2.5 hours - $150-$180
Lightening/blonding throughout top of head and hairlines.

Full Head Blonding - 3 hours - $180-$375
Lightening/blonding top, sides and back of head. Includes blowout.

sections.heading: Cut & Styling
sections.body:
Signature Blowout - 45 minutes - $45-$65
Hair wash, head massage, blow-dry and style using Oribe and Goldwell Kerasilk. Does NOT include iron work.

Haircut And Blow Dry - 45 minutes - $85-$150
In-depth consultation, custom haircut with luxurious wash, scalp massage, blowout and style.

sections.heading: Treatments
sections.body:
Keratin Smoothing - $290+ (for 2oz) $30 per extra oz
Tame or enhance natural hair. Reduce style time, frizz, or volume.

sections.heading: NBR Extensions
sections.body: Experience natural, lightweight, comfortable hair extensions. Studio One specializes in Natural Beaded Row extensions with luxury services.

faq_items.q: What form of payment do you take?
faq_items.a: Cash, Debit Cards, Apple Pay, Visa, and MasterCard accepted.

faq_items.q: Is it okay to have products in my hair?
faq_items.a: Light products okay. Avoid temporary root concealers for optimal grey coverage.

faq_items.q: How long do I have to cancel or reschedule my appointment?
faq_items.a: Provide 48-hour notice to cancel or reschedule.
Children present only for their own services. Must be supervised at all times.

faq_items.q: What if I miss my appointment or don't cancel without giving a 48-hour notice?
faq_items.a: 50% service charge billed per booked service. Payment due before future appointments.
Yes, we work with all ages. No different rates per age or gender.
